Whisper

This is similar to the Ship of Theseus paradox,

first posed by Plutarch in ancient Greece.

Ship of Theseus

The Ship of Theseus, also known as Theseus's Paradox, is a paradox and common thought experiment about whether an object is the same object after having all of its original components replaced over time, typically one after the other.

Knowledge injection

Whisper

You have 15 mins before the call. Perfect for

reviewing yesterday’s Spanish verbs!

ten years, what moat

would be the reason?

the tree structure first.

I researched the AI Avatar market,
felt it was the right moment to share.

• Leading players: Aethesia, YaiGen, BeepBrain

• Trends: real-time avatars & multimodal interaction

• Shifts: open-source models gaining traction

Architecture

Architecture

Powered by advanced
Memory-Triggering System

Powered by advanced
Memory-Triggering System

Every second while it is running, Whisper recalls all memories related to the user’s current screen and audio through incremental-conditional retrieval, and then decides on an action.

Every second while it is running, Whisper recalls all memories related to the user’s current screen and audio through incremental-conditional retrieval, and then decides on an action.

Every second while it is running, Whisper recalls all memories related to the user’s current screen and audio through incremental-conditional retrieval, and then decides on an action.

    Context compounding

    Whisper takes into account all previous contexts related to the situation when providing help. The more it experiences, the more useful it becomes.

    History & Reflection

    53 times triggered this week

    You just copied a function. There’s a file in PR #128 with the same name. Want to compare?

    5:29 PM

    Trigger

    Noticed the clipboard had handleSubmit(), a familiar pattern. At the same time, a GitHub PR was already sitting in the background, so it felt natural to connect the two. They had done something almost identical last week, which reinforced my decision to step in.

    User closed window

    5:31 PM

    Feedback

    Didn’t click or respond. Instead, switched tabs and searched for the file. It seems like the hint was registered but I haven’t trusted enough to act on it. Maybe I came across as too forceful, or maybe they prefer to verify things on their own before diving in.

    Memory Update

    Add preview to get permission when referencing func.

    Don’t forget you have meeting in tomorrow!

    4:28 PM

    Here’s some prompt suggestion that you can paste into krea ai for your asset image generation.

    2:41 PM

    Feedback & Personalization

    Whisper remembers your preferences, connects it with situational information to understand, and keeps referring back to it during future triggers.

  • Reply to comments

  • Send messages

  • Send Pull Requests

  • Generate pages

  • Leave comments
